meaning: int.蝠雁諜,蜥ｳ蝸ｽ謌匁ｸɾ欄蟄千噪螢ｰ髻ｳ
examples: Ahem, can I make a suggestion?
Penguins, ahem, are black and white.
If you call before then, the IRS will likely politely (ahem) ask you to call back later.
The thinking is that some people were, ahem, inflating the amount of goods they donated each year.
